name: dong quai
summary: Mechanism context: ligustilide and ferulic-acid vascular signaling, smooth-muscle modulation, phytoestrogen-like activity. Safety: May increase bleeding risk and may not be appropriate in hormone-sensitive conditions. Pregnancy avoidance is important due to uterine/circulatory concerns.. Interactions tracked: Caution with anticoagulants, antiplatelets, NSAIDs.

preparation: Often studied in formulas; do not generalize formula evidence to single-herb Angelica sinensis.
